title: 32x Classic Netherite Armor
description: Redesigns Netherite armor from Faithful 32x to match the shape of Diamond armor.
body:
This resource pack redesigns the Netherite armor texture in Faithful 32x to visually match the shape and style of the Diamond armor.
It preserves the resolution and overall aesthetic of the Faithful pack while modifying the silhouette and detailing of the Netherite armor to more closely resemble its Diamond counterpart — including helmet structure, chestplate trim, and boot proportions. This makes the upgrade from Diamond to Netherite feel more like a visual continuation rather than a drastic departure. Perfect for players who prefer consistency in armor design or want a more unified progression in appearance.

Make sure to Download Faithful 32x! 
[https://modrinth.com/user/Faithful-Resource-Pack](https://modrinth.com/user/Faithful-Resource-Pack)

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
